model.path_note: API reads model path from CSD_MODEL_PATH or approved registry; this file is only for threshold selection & UI display.

operating_threshold.name: p99_calibrated
operating_threshold.note: Operational p99 from QC-filtered calibration file; inference uses same unweighted score as strict evaluation.

operating_metrics.evaluation: strict four-attack subset (noise, spike, drift, freeze)

metrics_reference.note: Dashboard snapshot at operational p99 (four-attack strict eval) when active thresholds are thresholds_qc_filtered.json. Full copy also under thresholds_qc_filtered.json performance_metrics.
